## Evidence Checklist

- [ ] Deficiency evidence file updated under `evidence/`.
- [ ] Before evidence saved under `evidence/assets/`.
- [ ] After evidence saved under `evidence/assets/`.
- [ ] Literature source and IEEE citation draft recorded.
- [ ] Old-vs-new code snippet recorded.
- [ ] Same reproduction steps verified after the fix.
- [ ] Quantified before-vs-after result recorded.
- [ ] Baseline evidence updated if this PR owns a baseline item.
- [ ] At least one code reviewer assigned.
- [ ] At least one evidence verifier assigned.
- [ ] No unrelated coursework handouts, temporary screenshots, or `.DS_Store` files included.
